variants: Tahlia Rutledge was born in Golden Orchard and grew up with a strong passion for the arts. Tahlia currently works at Glintstream Technology, utilizing her talent and knowledge alongside her colleagues. In addition to her professional life, she serves as a Recruiter for Lattice Lane Studio, which allows her to support local artists. Tahlia enjoys speaking Romanian phrases, further promoting cultural exchange and diversity in her community.
